'''wapasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoe|yoe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoe|yoe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wapasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæpæsæth|wæpæsæth]] || [[word:wæpæsæj|wæpæsæj]] || [[word:wæpæsæsh|wæpæsæsh]] || [[word:wæpæsæ|wæpæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapapasath|wapapasath]] || [[word:wapapasaj|wapapasaj]] || [[word:wapapasash|wapapasash]] || [[word:wapapasa|wapapasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapasath|wapasath]] || [[word:wapasaj|wapasaj]] || [[word:wapasash|wapasash]] || [[word:wapasa|wapasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapafsath|wapafsath]] || [[word:wapafsaj|wapafsaj]] || [[word:wapafsash|wapafsash]] || [[word:wapafsaf|wapafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wapasatha|wapasatha]] || [[word:wapasaja|wapasaja]] || [[word:wapasasha|wapasasha]] || [[word:wapasaka|wapasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wapasath|wapasath]] || [[word:wapasaj|wapasaj]] || [[word:wapasash|wapasash]] || [[word:wapasa|wapasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wapasathal|wapasathal]] || [[word:wapasajal|wapasajal]] || [[word:wapasashal|wapasashal]] || [[word:wapasakal|wapasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wapasathatha|wapasathatha]] || [[word:wapasajaja|wapasajaja]] || [[word:wapasashasha|wapasashasha]] || [[word:wapasaka|wapasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wapasathan|wapasathan]] || [[word:wapasajan|wapasajan]] || [[word:wapasashan|wapasashan]] || [[word:wapasakan|wapasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wapasathaoro|wapasathaoro]] || [[word:wapasajaoro|wapasajaoro]] || [[word:wapasashaoro|wapasashaoro]] || [[word:wapasakaoro|wapasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
